_comment: ClaudePress composer fragment — website branch. ADDITIVE only: merged on top of the Bedrock composer.json, which already provides roots/wordpress (core) and the base packages (composer/installers, vlucas/phpdotenv, roots/wp-config, roots/bedrock-autoloader, ...). Do NOT re-list those here. WordPress plugins use Roots' WP Packages repo (wp-plugin/<slug>), registered in Bedrock by default since WPackagist's 2026 retirement (https://roots.io/introducing-wp-composer-as-a-wpackagist-replacement/). Dev tooling comes from regular Packagist. Versions reflect June 2026.
